resources.string: Please enter a valid email address
Password must be at least 10 characters
Password must contain at least one letter and one number
Too many attempts. Wait %1$d s before trying again.
No account found with this email
Authentication error. Please verify your credentials
An account already exists with this email. Would you like to sign in?
Password is too weak. Try a stronger one
Connection error. Check your internet and try again
Registration error. Please verify your details and try again
We sent a verification email to %s.\n\nVerify your email to activate all app features.
Guest mode activated. Some features will be limited.
What would you like to do today?
Are you sure you want to sign out? You will lose access to your favorites, saved routes, and statistics.
Type at least 2 characters to search
You already checked in here today
You already left a review for this place
AI will create the perfect route for you\n%s
Please enter budget and available time
Budget must be a number greater than 0
Available time must be between 0.5 and 24 hours
Select at least one interest or describe what you are looking for
Error: Gemini API key not configured
Generation took too long. Try again with simpler preferences.
Connection error. Check your internet and try again.
Error generating route. Please try again.
AI could not generate a route with those criteria. Try different preferences.
✨ Route created with %1$d destinations\nYou have %2$d AI routes left today
Critical error loading places from database.
You no longer like this article
Are you sure you want to delete \'%s\'?
You must sign in to delete routes
You do not have permission to delete this route
Nickname must be at least 3 characters
No internet connection. Some data may not load.
New password must be at least 6 characters

This action is irreversible. All your data will be deleted:

• Saved routes
• Favorites
• Check-ins
• Reviews
• Statistics

Are you sure you want to continue?
For security, enter your password to confirm:
A JSON file will be generated with your profile, favorites, check-ins, routes, and reviews (GDPR Art. 20 — data portability). The file will be shared from your device.
Are you sure you want to sign out?
Discover historic places, cultural events, and unique experiences in this Pueblo Mágico
Receive automatic alerts when you are near interesting tourist spots
Generate itineraries with AI or explore curated routes designed by experts
If the email exists, you will receive a reset link.
Notifications will only work while the app is open
%1$d places monitored\nYou will receive notifications when nearby

📸

No photos yet

Be the first to share photos of this place
To %s you need to create an account or sign in.\n\nWould you like to continue?
An error occurred. Please try again.

To generate your personalized route, TrazaGo will send your preferences (budget, time, interests, specific request) to the Google Gemini AI service.

• This data may be temporarily stored by Google according to their usage policies.
• You can review our Privacy Policy for more information.
• This feature is optional — you can always browse places and events without using AI.

Do you agree to continue?

TrazaGo uses your location in the background to send you notifications when you are near tourist spots, even when the app is closed or not in use.

• This feature is optional.
• You can disable it at any time from Device Settings or Profile → Proximity Notifications.
• Your location is never shared with third parties.

Would you like to allow TrazaGo to access your location in the background?
Proximity notifications disabled. You can enable them later.
By creating an account you accept our <u><font color="#006A67">Privacy Policy</font></u>
By continuing you accept our <u><font color="#006A67">Privacy Policy</font></u>

**PRIVACY NOTICE — TrazaGo (TrazaGo)**
Controller: José Ibarra / TrazaGo Contact: joseinnit04@outlook.com
**Data we collect** • Email address and password (authentication) • Nickname / display name (personalization) • Profile photo (optional) • Precise location (geofencing and map) • Check-in history (visited places with date/time) • Favorites and saved routes • Reviews and ratings • Prompts sent to the AI service (Google Gemini) to generate routes
**Who we share your data with** • Google Firebase (Auth, Firestore, Storage, Analytics, Crashlytics) • Google Maps Platform • Google Gemini AI (only the text of the route generation prompt) • OpenWeatherMap (only geographic coordinates of Álamos, Sonora)
**Your rights (GDPR Art. 15-21 / LFPDPPP Art. 22-27)** You have the right to: Access, rectify, erase, port, and object to the processing of your data. Exercise your rights from Menu → My Profile (edit, export data, delete account).
**International transfers** Data is processed on Google LLC servers (USA) under EU Standard Contractual Clauses.
**Retention** Data is kept while your account is active. When you delete your account, all your data is removed from our systems within 30 days.
**Changes to this policy** We will notify you of significant changes through an in-app notice.
NOTE: This is a provisional notice. The final legal text is pending review by legal counsel.
Only administrators can edit the blog
We\'ll notify you when new events are scheduled in Álamos.
When you save places they\'ll appear here for quick access.
Generate your first AI-powered custom route.
Find places, events, blog posts or saved routes.
Try different keywords or check spelling.
We\'ll use your email to sign in
At least 6 characters, include a letter and number
E.g.: I want to see the historic center at sunset
Add a restaurant at lunch time
What would you like to change?
Route must have at least 2 stops
Select a preset or write your feedback
Add places to the route first
Will appear at the top of the list
Enter your email and we\'ll send you a reset link.
This route is AI-generated and may vary. Verify schedules and prices before visiting each place.
Check out this event on TrazaGo: %1$s · %2$s · %3$s — %4$s
When do you want the reminder?
Our experts are curating routes to discover Álamos. Check back soon.
Get alerts when approaching tourist spots
Slide to adjust distance (50 m - 1000 m)
Tips and guides for your visit
Saved itineraries for your next adventure
⚠️ Radii < 100 m may be unreliable due to GPS accuracy.

• Automatically detects when near a tourist spot
• Shows a notification with place info
• Works even when the app is closed
• Saves battery using smart geofences
No Gemini API key available. Check Remote Config.
AI generated an invalid route: %s. Try regenerating.
Card to open the Community: read and share experiences
Be the first to share one
It will be deleted along with its comments and photos.
No comments yet. Be the first!
